message.content:
Explore the LFP2D project's existing UI widget patterns to understand how HUD-style widgets are built. I need to understand:

1. Look at the Shop widget (Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPShopWidget.h and .cpp) - how does it display gold, relics, etc?
2. Look at the Battle Result widget (Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPBattleResultWidget.h and .cpp) - another UI pattern example
3. Look at the Deployment widget (Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPDeploymentWidget.h and .cpp) - how does it bind to data?
4. Check Relic types - read Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicTypes.h and Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicDataAsset.h
5. Look at the Teleport widget if it exists - Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPTeleportWidget.h and .cpp
6. Check how existing widgets use BindWidget pattern and delegates

Be thorough - I need to understand the standard patterns for creating new widgets in this project.

content.text: I'll explore the LFP2D project's UI widget patterns thoroughly. Let me start by examining the files you've listed.

content.content:
1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "Blueprint/UserWidget.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
6	#include "LFPBattleResultWidget.generated.h"
7	
8	class UTextBlock;
9	class UButton;
10	class UWrapBox;
11	class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
12	
13	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnBattleResultConfirmedSignature);
14	
15	/**
16	 * 战斗结算面板：全屏显示胜负、奖励（金币/食物）、捕获单位
17	 */
18	UCLASS()
19	class LFP2D_API ULFPBattleResultWidget : public UUserWidget
20	{
21		GENERATED_BODY()
22	
23	public:
24		// 初始化结算数据
25		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Battle Result")
26		void Setup(const FLFPBattleResult& Result, ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset* Registry);
27	
28		// 确认按钮委托
29		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
30		FOnBattleResultConfirmedSignature OnConfirmPressed;
31	
32	protected:
33		virtual void NativeConstruct() override;
34	
35		// ============== BindWidget ==============
36	
37		// 胜负标题文本
38		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle Result", meta = (BindWidget))
39		TObjectPtr<UTextBlock> Text_Result;
40	
41		// 金币奖励文本
42		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle Result", meta = (BindWidget))
43		TObjectPtr<UTextBlock> Text_Gold;
44	
45		// 食物奖励文本
46		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle Result", meta = (BindWidget))
47		TObjectPtr<UTextBlock> Text_Food;
48	
49		// 捕获单位容器（可选，胜利且有捕获时显示）
50		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle Result", meta = (BindWidgetOptional))
51		TObjectPtr<UWrapBox> Box_CapturedUnits;
52	
53		// 确认按钮
54		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Battle Result", meta = (BindWidget))
55		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Confirm;
56	
57		// ============== 数据缓存 ==============
58	
59		UPROPERTY()
60		FLFPBattleResult CachedResult;
61	
62		UPROPERTY()
63		TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
64	
65	private:
66		UFUNCTION()
67		void OnConfirmClicked();
68	};
69

content.text: Now let me examine the Deployment widget and the Relic types:

content.content:
1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "Engine/Texture2D.h"
5	#include "GameplayTagContainer.h"
6	#include "LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h"
7	#include "LFP2D/Unit/LFPUnitTypes.h"
8	#include "LFPRelicTypes.generated.h"
9	
10	// ============== 静态遗物效果（部署时一次性生效） ==============
11	
12	// 遗物效果类型（第一期只做稳定的战斗数值被动）
13	UENUM(BlueprintType)
14	enum class ELFPRelicEffectType : uint8
15	{
16		RET_MaxHealthFlat UMETA(DisplayName = "最大生命"),
17		RET_AttackFlat    UMETA(DisplayName = "攻击力"),
18		RET_DefenseFlat   UMETA(DisplayName = "防御力"),
19		RET_SpeedFlat     UMETA(DisplayName = "速度"),
20	};
21	
22	// ============== 战斗遗物规则系统 ==============
23	
24	// 目标筛选：阵营
25	UENUM(BlueprintType)
26	enum class ELFPRelicTargetAffiliation : uint8
27	{
28		RTA_Player  UMETA(DisplayName = "我方"),
29		RTA_Enemy   UMETA(DisplayName = "敌方"),
30		RTA_Neutral UMETA(DisplayName = "中立"),
31	};
32	
33	// 触发时机
34	UENUM(BlueprintType)
35	enum class ELFPRelicTriggerType : uint8
36	{
37		RTT_BattleStart      UMETA(DisplayName = "战斗开始"),
38		RTT_RoundStart       UMETA(DisplayName = "回合开始"),
39		RTT_RoundEnd         UMETA(DisplayName = "回合结束"),
40		RTT_UnitTurnStart    UMETA(DisplayName = "单位回合开始"),
41		RTT_UnitTurnEnd      UMETA(DisplayName = "单位回合结束"),
42		RTT_HealthChanged    UMETA(DisplayName = "血量变化后"),
43		RTT_MoveFinished     UMETA(DisplayName = "移动结束后"),
44		RTT_AttackAfter      UMETA(DisplayName = "攻击后"),
45		RTT_DamagedAfter     UMETA(DisplayName = "受击后"),
46		RTT_KillAfter        UMETA(DisplayName = "击杀后"),
47	};
48	
49	// 条件类型
50	UENUM(BlueprintType)
51	enum class ELFPRelicConditionType : uint8
52	{
53		RCT_None               UMETA(DisplayName = "无条件"),
54		RCT_HealthPercentBelow UMETA(DisplayName = "血量比例低于"),
55		RCT_HealthPercentAbove UMETA(DisplayName = "血量比例高于"),
56		RCT_HealthIsFull       UMETA(DisplayName = "满血"),
57		RCT_StatValueBelow     UMETA(DisplayName = "属性值低于"),
58		RCT_StatValueAbove     UMETA(DisplayName = "属性值高于"),
59		RCT_MovedTilesAtLeast  UMETA(DisplayName = "移动格数至少"),
60		RCT_DamageDealtAtLeast UMETA(DisplayName = "造成伤害至少"),
61		RCT_HasRelic           UMETA(DisplayName = "拥有遗物"),
62		RCT_HasAllRelics       UMETA(DisplayName = "拥有全部遗物"),
63	};
64	
65	// 属性类型（条件和效果共用）
66	UENUM(BlueprintType)
67	enum class ELFPRelicStatType : uint8
68	{
69		RST_None          UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
70		RST_Attack        UMETA(DisplayName = "攻击力"),
71		RST_MaxHealth     UMETA(DisplayName = "最大生命"),
72		RST_Speed         UMETA(DisplayName = "速度"),
73		RST_PhysicalBlock UMETA(DisplayName = "物理格挡"),
74		RST_SpellDefense  UMETA(DisplayName = "法术防御"),
75		RST_AttackCount   UMETA(DisplayName = "攻击次数"),
76		RST_ActionCount   UMETA(DisplayName = "行动次数"),
77	};
78	
79	// 战斗效果类型
80	UENUM(BlueprintType)
81	enum class ELFPRelicBattleEffectType : uint8
82	{
83		RBET_HealFlat          UMETA(DisplayName = "回复生命"),
84		RBET_DamageFlat        UMETA(DisplayName = "造成伤害"),
85		RBET_ModifyStatFlat    UMETA(DisplayName = "属性固定值修改"),
86		RBET_ModifyStatPercent UMETA(DisplayName = "属性百分比修改"),
87		RBET_AddTag            UMETA(DisplayName = "添加标签"),
88		RBET_RemoveTag         UMETA(DisplayName = "移除标签"),
89	};
90	
91	// 持续方式
92	UENUM(BlueprintType)
93	enum class ELFPRelicDurationType : uint8
94	{
95		RDT_Instant            UMETA(DisplayName = "瞬时"),
96		RDT_UntilRoundEnd      UMETA(DisplayName = "持续到回合结束"),
97		RDT_UntilUnitTurnEnd   UMETA(DisplayName = "持续到单位回合结束"),
98		RDT_WhileConditionTrue UMETA(DisplayName = "条件成立时持续"),
99	};
100	
101	// ============== 静态遗物效果结构 ==============
102	
103	// 单条遗物效果
104	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
105	struct FLFPRelicEffectEntry
106	{
107		GENERATED_BODY()
108	
109		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
110		ELFPRelicEffectType EffectType = ELFPRelicEffectType::RET_MaxHealthFlat;
111	
112		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
113		int32 Value = 0;
114	};
115	
116	// ============== 战斗遗物规则结构 ==============
117	
118	// 目标筛选器
119	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
120	struct FLFPRelicTargetFilter
121	{
122		GENERATED_BODY()
123	
124		// 是否只作用于触发单位自身
125		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
126		bool bAffectSelfOnly = true;
127	
128		// 生效阵营筛选；为空表示不过滤
129		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
130		TArray<ELFPRelicTargetAffiliation> Affiliations;
131	
132		// 生效种族筛选；为空表示不过滤
133		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
134		TArray<ELFPUnitRace> Races;
135	
136		// 必须拥有的标签；为空表示不过滤
137		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
138		FGameplayTagContainer RequiredTags;
139	
140		// 禁止拥有的标签；为空表示不过滤
141		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
142		FGameplayTagContainer BlockedTags;
143	};
144	
145	// 单条条件
146	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
147	struct FLFPRelicCondition
148	{
149		GENERATED_BODY()
150	
151		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
152		ELFPRelicConditionType ConditionType = ELFPRelicConditionType::RCT_None;
153	
154		// 用于属性类条件
155		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
156		ELFPRelicStatType StatType = ELFPRelicStatType::RST_None;
157	
158		// 用于整数阈值（如攻击<5、移动5格等）
159		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
160		int32 IntValue = 0;
161	
162		// 用于比例阈值（如血量<40%）
163		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
164		float FloatValue = 0.f;
165	
166		// 用于遗物拥有条件
167		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
168		TArray<FName> RelicIDs;
169	};
170	
171	// 单条战斗效果
172	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
173	struct FLFPRelicBattleEffect
174	{
175		GENERATED_BODY()
176	
177		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
178		ELFPRelicBattleEffectType EffectType = ELFPRelicBattleEffectType::RBET_HealFlat;
179	
180		// 用于属性修改类效果
181		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
182		ELFPRelicStatType StatType = ELFPRelicStatType::RST_None;
183	
184		// 用于固定值效果
185		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
186		int32 IntValue = 0;
187	
188		// 用于百分比效果（如 +50% = 0.5）
189		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
190		float FloatValue = 0.f;
191	
192		// 用于 Tag 类效果
193		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
194		FGameplayTag Tag;
195	};
196	
197	// 单条战斗遗物规则
198	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
199	struct FLFPRelicBattleRule
200	{
201		GENERATED_BODY()
202	
203		// 规则 ID（便于调试和运行时状态跟踪）
204		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
205		FName RuleID = NAME_None;
206	
207		// 什么时候检查这条规则
208		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
209		ELFPRelicTriggerType TriggerType = ELFPRelicTriggerType::RTT_BattleStart;
210	
211		// 对谁生效
212		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
213		FLFPRelicTargetFilter TargetFilter;
214	
215		// 生效条件（默认全部满足才触发）
216		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
217		TArray<FLFPRelicCondition> Conditions;
218	
219		// 生效效果
220		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
221		TArray<FLFPRelicBattleEffect> Effects;
222	
223		// 持续方式
224		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Battle Rule")
225		ELFPRelicDurationType DurationType = ELFPRelicDurationType::RDT_Instant;
226	};
227	
228	// 遗物组合规则
229	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
230	struct FLFPRelicSynergyRule
231	{
232		GENERATED_BODY()
233	
234		// 组合规则 ID
235		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
236		FName SynergyID = NAME_None;
237	
238		// 需要同时拥有的遗物
239		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
240		TArray<FName> RequiredRelicIDs;
241	
242		// 什么时候检查
243		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
244		ELFPRelicTriggerType TriggerType = ELFPRelicTriggerType::RTT_BattleStart;
245	
246		// 对谁生效
247		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
248		FLFPRelicTargetFilter TargetFilter;
249	
250		// 生效条件
251		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
252		TArray<FLFPRelicCondition> Conditions;
253	
254		// 生效效果
255		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
256		TArray<FLFPRelicBattleEffect> Effects;
257	
258		// 持续方式
259		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic|Synergy")
260		ELFPRelicDurationType DurationType = ELFPRelicDurationType::RDT_Instant;
261	};
262	
263	// 遗物定义
264	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
265	struct FLFPRelicDefinition
266	{
267		GENERATED_BODY()
268	
269		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
270		FText DisplayName;
271	
272		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
273		TObjectPtr<UTexture2D> Icon = nullptr;
274	
275		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
276		FText Description;
277	
278		// 静态效果：部署/战斗开始时一次性生效
279		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
280		TArray<FLFPRelicEffectEntry> Effects;
281	
282		// 战斗内动态规则
283		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
284		TArray<FLFPRelicBattleRule> BattleRules;
285	};
286	
287	// 商店中的单个售卖条目
288	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
289	struct FLFPShopRelicEntry
290	{
291		GENERATED_BODY()
292	
293		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Shop")
294		FName RelicID = NAME_None;
295	
296		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Shop", meta = (ClampMin = "0"))
297		int32 Price = 0;
298	};
299	
300	// 单个商店定义
301	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
302	struct FLFPShopDefinition
303	{
304		GENERATED_BODY()
305	
306		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Shop")
307		FText DisplayName;
308	
309		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Shop")
310		TArray<FLFPShopRelicEntry> RelicList;
311	};
312

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "Engine/DataAsset.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicTypes.h"
6	#include "LFPRelicDataAsset.generated.h"
7	
8	/**
9	 * 遗物注册表：RelicID -> 遗物定义
10	 */
11	UCLASS(Blueprintable)
12	class LFP2D_API ULFPRelicDataAsset : public UDataAsset
13	{
14		GENERATED_BODY()
15	
16	public:
17		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
18		TMap<FName, FLFPRelicDefinition> RelicMap;
19	
20		// 遗物组合规则
21		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
22		TArray<FLFPRelicSynergyRule> SynergyRules;
23	
24		UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Relic")
25		bool FindRelicDefinition(FName RelicID, FLFPRelicDefinition& OutDefinition) const;
26	};
27

1	#pragma once
2	
3	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
4	#include "Blueprint/UserWidget.h"
5	#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
6	#include "LFPDeploymentWidget.generated.h"
7	
8	class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
9	class UButton;
10	class UImage;
11	
12	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnDeploymentUnitSelected, int32, PartyIndex);
13	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnDeploymentConfirmed);
14	
15	/**
16	 * 布置阶段 UI：显示队伍单位列表，玩家点击选中后放置到出生点
17	 */
18	UCLASS()
19	class LFP2D_API ULFPDeploymentWidget : public UUserWidget
20	{
21		GENERATED_BODY()
22	
23	public:
24		// 初始化 UI 数据
25		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Deployment")
26		void Setup(const TArray<FLFPUnitEntry>& PartyUnits, ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset* Registry);
27	
28		// 标记某单位已放置/未放置
29		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Deployment")
30		void MarkUnitPlaced(int32 PartyIndex, bool bPlaced);
31	
32		// 设置确认按钮是否可用
33		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Deployment")
34		void SetConfirmEnabled(bool bEnabled);
35	
36		// 标记某单位正在被选中拖拽
37		UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Deployment")
38		void MarkUnitSelecting(int32 PartyIndex);
39	
40		// 委托：玩家点击了某个单位图标
41		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
42		FOnDeploymentUnitSelected OnUnitSelected;
43	
44		// 委托：玩家按下确认按钮
45		UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
46		FOnDeploymentConfirmed OnConfirmPressed;
47	
48	protected:
49		virtual void NativeConstruct() override;
50	
51		// ============== BindWidget 绑定 ==============
52	
53		// 3 个单位按钮
54		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
55		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Unit0;
56	
57		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
58		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Unit1;
59	
60		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
61		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Unit2;
62	
63		// 3 个单位图标
64		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
65		TObjectPtr<UImage> Image_Unit0;
66	
67		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
68		TObjectPtr<UImage> Image_Unit1;
69	
70		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
71		TObjectPtr<UImage> Image_Unit2;
72	
73		// 确认按钮
74		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment", meta = (BindWidget))
75		TObjectPtr<UButton> Button_Confirm;
76	
77		// ============== 数据 ==============
78	
79		// 队伍数据缓存
80		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment")
81		TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CachedPartyUnits;
82	
83		// 注册表引用
84		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment")
85		TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
86	
87		// 各单位是否已放置
88		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment")
89		TArray<bool> PlacedStates;
90	
91		// 确认按钮是否可用
92		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Deployment")
93		bool bConfirmEnabled = false;
94	
95	private:
96		// 按钮点击回调
97		UFUNCTION() void OnUnit0Clicked();
98		UFUNCTION() void OnUnit1Clicked();
99		UFUNCTION() void OnUnit2Clicked();
100		UFUNCTION() void OnConfirmClicked();
101	
102		// 获取按钮/图标数组访问
103		UButton* GetUnitButton(int32 Index) const;
104		UImage* GetUnitImage(int32 Index) const;
105	
106		// 更新单位槽位的视觉状态
107		void UpdateSlotVisual(int32 Index);
108	};
109

15	
16	// 战斗请求：世界地图 → 战斗场景传递的数据
17	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
18	struct FLFPBattleRequest
19	{
20		GENERATED_BODY()
21	
22		// 触发战斗的节点 ID
23		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
24		int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
25	
26		// 战斗地图 CSV 文件名（对应 Saved/Maps/ 下的 CSV）
27		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
28		FString BattleMapName;
29	
30		// 敌人星级
31		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
32		int32 StarRating = 1;
33	
34		// 是否可逃跑
35		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
36		bool bCanEscape = true;
37	
38		// 节点基础金币奖励
39		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
40		int32 BaseGoldReward = 0;
41	
42		// 节点基础食物奖励
43		UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
44		int32 BaseFoodReward = 0;
45	
46		// 是否有有效请求
47		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
48		bool bIsValid = false;
49	};
50	
51	// 战斗结果：战斗场景 → 世界地图传递的数据
52	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
53	struct FLFPBattleResult
54	{
55		GENERATED_BODY()
56	
57		// 对应的节点 ID
58		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
59		int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
60	
61		// 是否胜利
62		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
63		bool bVictory = false;
64	
65		// 是否逃跑
66		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
67		bool bEscaped = false;
68	
69		// 战斗中捕获的单位列表（背叛系统触发）
70		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
71		TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CapturedUnits;
72	
73		// 总金币奖励（基础 + 击杀掉落）
74		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
75		int32 GoldReward = 0;
76	
77		// 总食物奖励（基础 + 击杀掉落）
78		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
79		int32 FoodReward = 0;
80	
81		// 是否有有效结果
82		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
83		bool bIsValid = false;
84	};
85	
86	// 世界地图状态快照：跨关卡保持
87	USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
88	struct FLFPWorldMapSnapshot
89	{
90		GENERATED_BODY()
91	
92		// 当前世界地图名
93		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
94		FString WorldMapName;
95	
96		// 玩家当前节点 ID
97		UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
98		int32 CurrentNodeID = 0;
99	
100		// 已消耗回合数

content.text: Perfect! Now let me look at one more thing - checking how the Turn Manager works for event binding patterns:

content.content:
1	// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
2	
3	#pragma once
4	
5	#include "CoreMinimal.h"
6	#include "GameFramework/Actor.h"
7	#include "LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h"
8	#include "LFPTurnManager.generated.h"
9	
10	class ALFPTacticsUnit;
11	
12	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnTurnChangedSignature);
13	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnPhaseChangedSignature, EBattlePhase, NewPhase);
14	DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnFactionAPChangedSignature, EUnitAffiliation, Faction, int32, NewAP);
15	
16	UCLASS()
17	class LFP2D_API ALFPTurnManager : public AActor
18	{
19		GENERATED_BODY()
20	
21	public:
22	    ALFPTurnManager();
23	
24	    // 开始游戏回合系统
25	    void StartGame();
26	
27	    // 开始新回合
28	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
29	    void BeginNewRound();
30	
31	    // 结束当前回合
32	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
33	    void EndCurrentRound();
34	
35	    // 获取当前行动单位
36	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
37	    ALFPTacticsUnit* GetCurrentUnit() const { return CurrentUnit; }
38	
39	    // 获取当前回合数
40	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
41	    int32 GetCurrentRound() const { return CurrentRound; }
42	
43	    // 获取当前单位列表
44	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
45	    TArray<ALFPTacticsUnit*> GetTurnOrderUnits() const { return TurnOrderUnits; }
46	
47	    // 传递回合到下一个单位
48	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
49	    void PassTurn();
50	
51	    // 当单位完成行动
52	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
53	    void OnUnitFinishedAction(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
54	
55	    // 注册单位到回合系统
56	    void RegisterUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
57	
58	    // 从回合系统注销单位
59	    void UnregisterUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
60	
61	    // 检查战斗结束条件（单位死亡后调用）
62	    void CheckBattleEnd();
63	
64	    // 结束布置阶段（玩家确认部署后调用）
65	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
66	    void EndDeploymentPhase();
67	
68	    // ==== 阶段系统 ====
69	
70	    // 获取当前战斗阶段
71	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
72	    EBattlePhase GetCurrentPhase() const { return CurrentPhase; }
73	
74	    // 查询某敌人的行动计划
75	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
76	    const FEnemyActionPlan& GetPlanForEnemy(ALFPTacticsUnit* Enemy) const;
77	
78	    // 获取所有敌人计划
79	    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
80	    const TArray<FEnemyActionPlan>& GetAllEnemyPlans() const { return EnemyActionPlans; }
